summary: Contest-critical HTTPS proxy tests were implemented and rerun for protocol parsing, async proxy TLS/mTLS, sync HTTPS proxy behavior, TLS-feature-off boundaries, and HTTP/3-over-proxy rejection.

code_under_test.coverage: CONNECT request construction and CONNECT response parsing, including 2xx success and fail-closed error cases.
Async HTTP/HTTPS proxy connector flow, HTTPS proxy TLS, CONNECT tunnel, origin TLS, no-TLS boundary, and HTTP/3-over-proxy fail-closed decision.
Sync HTTP/HTTPS proxy connector flow using the shared proxy CONNECT construction and parser semantics.
HTTP/3 feature build compatibility for ConnDetail import used by HTTP/3 pool dispatch.

passed_commands.name: connect-parser
passed_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --lib --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base ut_tunnel_request_and_response -- --nocapture

passed_commands.name: async-https-proxy-tls-mtls
passed_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --test sdv_async_https_proxy_tls --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base,c_openssl_3_0 -- --nocapture --test-threads=1
covers: async HTTP target over HTTPS proxy
async HTTPS target over HTTPS proxy
proxy TLS CA validation success and wrong-CA failure

passed_commands.name: sync-https-proxy
passed_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --test sdv_sync_https_proxy_tls --no-default-features --features sync,async,http1_1,tokio_base,c_openssl_3_0 -- --nocapture --test-threads=1
covers: sync HTTP target over HTTPS proxy
sync HTTPS target over HTTPS proxy
shared proxy CONNECT parser semantics through sync connector
proxy TLS distinct from origin TLS

passed_commands.name: no-tls-feature-boundary
passed_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --test sdv_https_proxy_no_tls --no-default-features --features sync,async,http1_1,tokio_base -- --nocapture --test-threads=1
covers: async HTTPS proxy fails closed without TLS feature
sync HTTPS proxy fails closed without TLS feature

passed_commands.name: http3-proxy-rejection
passed_commands.command: env -u LIBRARY_PATH -u LD_LIBRARY_PATH PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" RUSTFLAGS='-C link-arg=/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so -C link-arg=/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target_h3_explicit_ssl CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --lib --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,http3,ylong_base,c_openssl_3_0 ut_http3_over_proxy_is_rejected -- --nocapture
covers: HTTP/3 over proxy rejected by shared connector decision helper
connector branch calls the same helper before QUIC connection setup

diagnostics.case: initial full connector HTTP/3 proxy unit
diagnostics.observation: A test that constructed ConnectorConfig::default under async,http1_1,http3,ylong_base,c_openssl_3_0 crashed with SIGSEGV before connect() was polled.
diagnostics.root_cause_evidence: gdb backtrace showed the crash in SslContextBuilder::set_sigalgs_list during TlsConfig::default, before HTTP/3 proxy logic was reached.
diagnostics.resolution: HTTP/3-over-proxy rejection was factored into a pure http3_proxy_rejection helper and the connector branch calls that helper. The unit test covers the helper to avoid mixing proxy semantics with unrelated OpenSSL context initialization behavior.

diagnostics.observation: async,http1_1,http3,ylong_base without TLS does not compile because async_impl/quic imports c_openssl, TlsConfig, and libc while the http3 feature does not close that dependency set.
diagnostics.resolution: S5 records the executable HTTP/3 rejection evidence under the feature set that compiles in this workspace. The broader HTTP/3 feature dependency issue is outside the HTTPS proxy task but is preserved as a diagnostic fact.

environment_notes: CARGO_TARGET_DIR was set under /tmp because /home had insufficient free space for repeated builds.
Runtime dependency fetching used CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI and a per-command URL rewrite from gitee to the reachable GitHub mirror.
The HTTP/3 test required explicit system libssl/libcrypto link args in this workspace to avoid native OpenSSL symbol resolution failures.
claim_boundary: This matrix verifies HTTPS proxy protocol/TLS/mTLS/fail-closed behavior. It is not performance SOTA evidence and does not satisfy the libcurl-library benchmark threshold outcomes.
